name: SQL - Get count of Milestone records with NULL Estimate Date

content.query:
SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null
 
 UNION
 
 SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null

UNION

SELECT 
'HSI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'RTW' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'SWR' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'MAC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_mld_MilestoneDetail]
 where [EstDate] is null
